transcript: You're not scared being out this late? No, why would I be scared? I don't know Chelsea, maybe because of the Serbian dancing lady? The dancing who? The Serbian dancing lady. You haven't seen the videos? They have millions of views. No, can't say that I have. Are you sure? She's this woman who dances in the middle of the street and chases you with a knife. Yes, I'm sure. I think I would have remembered a dancing woman with a knife. So what are the videos, like a prank or something? From what I've heard, they're real. And if you come across her, whatever you do, don't- Hello? Erin? No way. Wait till I show this to Aaron. Oh, my God. misery and the house of the rock please help me What's going on? There's this woman. She's chasing me, and she has a knife. Um, I don't know. I... That's... That's really strange. Behind you! What? How did I end up back here?
